settings.header_description: Unlock the potential of your home with curated financing plans. Fast, secure, and designed around your lifestyle.

settings.name: Affirm
settings.description: Simple monthly payments without hidden fees or surprises. See if you qualify in seconds.

settings.name: Bread Pay
settings.description: Tailored financing solutions that work for your budget. Clear terms with no impact on credit score for pre-qualification.

settings.label: World-Class Partners
settings.description: Kitchero integrates with the most trusted financial institutions to provide transparent, fixed-monthly payment plans.

settings.title: Select Financing
settings.description: Choose Affirm or Bread Pay at checkout. Pre-qualify in seconds with no impact on your credit score.

settings.title: Pick Your Term
settings.description: Transparent, fixed monthly dues. Pick the plan length that fits your budget — 12, 24, or 36 months.

settings.title: Pay Monthly
settings.description: Predictable dues, zero hidden fees, no early-payoff penalties. Pay off faster whenever you're ready.

settings.label: How It Works
settings.heading: Three steps to your dream kitchen.
settings.description: Every plan is transparent, fixed-monthly, and approved without impact to your credit score.

settings.title: Can I pay off my purchase early?
settings.content: Absolutely. There is never a penalty for paying your balance off early. You can make additional payments through your provider's dashboard at any time.

settings.title: Does checking my rates affect my credit score?
settings.content: Starting the pre-approval process only requires a 'soft' credit inquiry, which does NOT impact your credit score. A 'hard' inquiry only occurs if you finalize a plan.

settings.title: What happens if I need to return an item?
settings.content: Our standard return policy applies. Once the return is processed, the refund will be applied directly to your financing balance, and your monthly payments will adjust accordingly.

settings.title: Are there any hidden service or application fees?
settings.content: Never. We value total transparency. The total amount shown at checkout is exactly what you will pay over the course of your term — not a penny more.

settings.title: What is the minimum loan amount?
settings.content: Financing options are typically available on cabinetry projects of $500 or more, though limits vary by provider and individual credit profile.

settings.label: Start Today
settings.heading: Start your transformation today.
settings.description: Beautiful cabinetry shouldn't wait. Secure your financing and bring your vision to life.
